userStories.title: Load missing norms - PSD2, Ley 10/2014, RD-ley 19/2018
userStories.verificationCommand: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE codigo IN ('32015L2366','LEY10_2014','RD19_2018')

userStories.title: Seed EAF obligations - fiscal (AEAT)
userStories.verificationCommand: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='eaf' AND obligacion_tipo IN ('AUTOLIQUIDACION','DECLARACION_INFORMATIVA')

userStories.title: Seed EAF obligations - PBC/FT
userStories.verificationCommand: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='eaf' AND obligacion_tipo IN ('DILIGENCIA_DEBIDA','COMUNICACION_INDICIO','CONTROL_INTERNO','FORMACION','REGISTRO')

userStories.verificationCommand: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='eaf'
